eg=function(ua,ub) local uc,ud,ue,uf,ug,uh,ui,uj,uk,ul ud={} uf={2252,4267,2186,4213,2120,4147,2078,4114,2009,4051,1967,3979,1889,3901,1850,3835,1784} ue=function(um) local un=uf[um] local djy(716165,2440,1921) djz[23],djw=7110,dka end else djw=108962 break end else if djw>=782232 then if djw==782232 then dkb=bl[29](djv) dka=djx[67320] or djy(67320,1637,1236) djz[26],djw=10848,dka elseif djw==786604 then return-dkc-1;else djw=108962 break end else if djw==248517 then return dkc;elseif djw==716684 then if(dkb%bl[2][26])==0 then djw,djz[49]=djx[246484] or djy(246484,2379,346),3804 else djw,djz[60]=djx[787961] or djy(787961,1370,2727),6064 end else djw=108962 break end end end end end;bh=bi[112] or bj(112) else bh=3806 break end else if bh==3380 then bl[33]=bl[32] bh=bi[117] or bj(117) elseif bh==3383 then bl[106]=nil bh=bi[264] or bj(264) else bh=3806 break end end end end end else if bh>=3443 then if bh>3458 then if bh<3464 then if bh==3461 then bl[93]=nil bh=bi[235] or bj(235) else bh=3806 break end else if bh<3467 then if bh==3464 then bl[76]=i(bl[19],bl[31]) bh=bi[199] or bj(199) else bh=3806 break end else if bh==3467 then bl[2][16][2]=(bl[2][34])-(59338700) bh=bi[47] or bj(47) elseif bh==3470 then bl[53]=nil bh=bi[161] or bj(161) else bh=3806 break end end end else if bh<=3452 then if bh<=3443 then if bh==3443 then bl[1][4]=((280)-3) bh=bi[7] or bj(7) else bh=3806 break end else if bh<=3446 then if bh==3446 then bl[104]=nil bh=bi[260] or bj(260) else bh=3806 break end else if bh==3452 then bl[1][11]=bl[1][8] bh=bi[30] or bj(30) elseif bh==3449 then
